manual_entries.title: ASHRAE Condenser Water Pump Design Speed by Stage
manual_entries.summary: For water-cooled plants with variable-speed condenser water pumps, each chiller stage should define a pump speed setpoint that delivers the design condenser-water flow through the operating chillers and waterside heat exchangers.

structured_payload.measurement_context: pump speed required to deliver design condenser water flow through the operating chillers in a stage

doc.file_name: HVAC系统高性能运行序列指南.pdf

chunk.cleaned_text: Cw-DesPumpSpdStage is the condenser water pump speed that delivers design condenser water flow through the chillers and waterside heat exchangers for a given stage.
chunk.text_excerpt: design condenser water pump speed by stage

evidence.evidence_text: Cw-DesPumpSpdStage is defined as the condenser water pump speed that delivers design condenser water flow through the chillers and waterside heat exchangers for a given chiller stage.

source_manual.path: /Volumes/TSD302/19.暖通论文/英文文献/手册与标准/HVAC系统高性能运行序列指南.pdf

manual_entries.title: ASHRAE Minimum Condenser Water Pump Speed
manual_entries.summary: Variable-speed condenser water pumps should define a minimum speed setpoint high enough to maintain minimum condenser water flow while head-pressure control is active.

structured_payload.measurement_context: minimum condenser water pump speed that maintains required condenser flow during head-pressure control

doc.file_name: HVAC系统高性能运行序列指南.pdf

chunk.cleaned_text: MinCWPspeed is the minimum condenser water pump speed and should be set high enough to maintain minimum condenser flow while head-pressure control is enabled.

evidence.evidence_text: MinCWPspeed is the minimum condenser water pump speed and should be established high enough to maintain minimum condenser water flow while the head-pressure control loop is enabled.

source_manual.path: /Volumes/TSD302/19.暖通论文/英文文献/手册与标准/HVAC系统高性能运行序列指南.pdf
